name: ai-chat-portal
description: Portal de chat com IA usando os modelos do GitHub Copilot via VS Code
author: Matheus Llobregat (https://github.com/mllcarvalho)

scripts.build: npm run typecheck -w @aiportal/shared && npm run build -w @aiportal/web && npm run build -w ai-chat-portal-extension
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package -w ai-chat-portal-extension
scripts.update-skill-creator: curl -sf -o extension/assets/skill-creator/SKILL.md https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/skills/main/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md && curl -sf -o extension/assets/skill-creator/LICENSE.txt https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/skills/main/skills/skill-creator/LICENSE.txt && echo 'Atualizado. Lembre de subir o SEED_VERSION em extension/src/storage/skillStore.ts.'
